meta.title: Create AI Animation Avatars That Can Talk & Walk (Step-by-Step)
meta.description:
Learn How to Create AI animated avatars that can Talk & walk
Try out OpenArt 👉 https://openart.ai/home?ref=talkingavatar

In this video I show you how to build your own AI animated Avatar that can talk and walk. This is perfect for building your own faceless youtube channel and you can easily tailor it to your liking. If you want to use my prompts make sure you sign up to my newsletter

👉My Prompts https://dk-avatar.carrd.co/

Tools Used
OpenArt -  https://openart.ai/home?ref=talkingavatar
Elevenlabs  - https://try.elevenlabs.io/swqj

📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dan.kieft/
